candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; clearly the primary sales line and populated across years.
Duplicate revenue label with same values; useful as fallback if label changes by year/case.
Not revenue; cost line.
Not revenue; cost subtotal.
Depreciation component, not revenue.
Amortization component, not revenue.

variables.notes: Used the two exact revenue labels as a priority list; later code can take the first non-missing value by year.

candidates.why: Most direct and semantically correct COGS label.
Close substitute but a total-style row; less preferred than explicit COGS.
Close substitute for cost of sales in some years, but less direct than explicit COGS.
Only a component of COGS, not the full amount.
Only a component of COGS, not the full amount.

variables.notes: Preferred the explicit COGS line over cost-of-revenues totals/subcomponents.

candidates.why: Core SG&A overhead component; broad selling expense line.
Core SG&A overhead component; broad administrative expense line.
Potential overhead bucket when no explicit SG&A subtotal exists.
Appears to be a smaller subcomponent/duplicate rather than the main selling expense row.
Appears to be a smaller subcomponent/duplicate rather than the main administrative expense row.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal row is present. Selected the main overhead component rows and excluded totals/subtotals and R&D/D&A.

candidates.why: Direct R&D expense line and populated in recent year.
Same concept under alternate wording/casing in earlier years; useful fallback.
Only a depreciation subcomponent of R&D, not total R&D.

variables.notes: Used the two direct R&D labels as a priority list and excluded the depreciation component.

candidates.why: Most direct interest expense label; preferred even if sparse.
Broader finance cost line; acceptable fallback if explicit interest expense is unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest component only; narrower than total interest expense.
Too broad/other finance items, not specifically interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure, not preferred as main interest line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Provided a priority list: explicit interest expense first, then broader financial expenses, then lease-interest as a narrower fallback.

candidates.why: Best available equity line; no separate parent/owners equity line is shown.
Duplicate label with same meaning and values; useful as fallback if label varies by year/case.
Not book equity; entire balance sheet total.

variables.notes: No separate parent-equity/owners-equity line is present, so used total equity as BE. To avoid double counting, MIB is left empty.
No minority interest/non-controlling interests line appears on the provided balance sheet.
